asset.title: Startup Diligence War Room
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough effectively demonstrates a collaborative startup diligence war room featuring multi-agent execution, public/private lanes, and structured handoffs. The UI is highly functional, though dense with information.

featureClarity.evidence: Demonstrates collaborative spreadsheet editing, multi-source research enrichment, and private agent execution clearly.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the full sequence from initial data view to enrichment execution, private lane analysis, and final handoff drafts.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode interface with structured panels, though the layout is dense with logs and chat messages.

consistency.evidence: Perfectly aligns with the NodeRoom paradigm of spreadsheets, public/private lanes, and live trace logs.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic product capture showing real-time state transitions, agent execution logs, and interactive inputs.

legibility.evidence: Small font sizes in the Room Trace and Copilot chat panels may be difficult to read at standard README display sizes.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for financial analysts and diligence teams managing multi-agent workflows.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately displays agent thinking times, pending states, and manual approval gates.

observedEvidence: Interactive spreadsheet with live collaboration indicators
Multi-source research enrichment queue with pending/complete states
Public and private agent lanes with toggle controls
Live Room Trace log showing agent actions and lock releases
Handoff approval panel with draft integrations

defects.observed: The Room Trace log text is extremely small and dense, making it hard to read without zooming.
defects.fix: Increase the default font size of the trace log or use a zoomed-in layout for video walkthroughs.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Run multi-agent startup diligence in NodeRoom: enrich company data, analyze privately, and approve structured handoffs to external tools.
